cards.name: 10 of Pentacles
cards.interpretation: legacy, roots, family, ancestry, inheritance, windfall, foundations, privilege, affluence, stability, tradition

cards.name: 3 of Pentacles, reversed
cards.interpretation: lack of cohesion, lack of teamwork, apathy, poor motivation, conflict, ego, competition

cards.name: Ace of Wands, reversed
cards.interpretation: delays, blocks, lack of passion, lack of energy, hesitancy, creative blocks
